client_updates.highlight: Zeam: bugs fixed but justification stalls at ~12,000 slots and finalization at ~9,000 slots; P95 block production and aggregation still ~4 seconds across most clients
Ream: finalized to ~44,941 slots on 4-subnet/24-node DevNet with Ethlambda; nodes dying from out-of-memory issues under active investigation
Ethlambda (Lambda CL): aggregation starts early at two-thirds attestation threshold; added ETH P2P as additional transport layer, interoping with Zeam
Gean: fixed indefinite-stall bug in block sync; improved checkpoint sync retry behavior for unavailable sources

proving_system_research.highlight: LeanVM binary field version (LeanVMB) in active development using Blake; 2-to-1 recursion currently ~2.5s vs ~500ms on classical LeanVM — ~4x slowdown, improving daily
Smaller sub-MTU XMSS signature branch (~1KB vs ~3KB) exists and is faster to prove; held back pending cryptographic security proof, more acceptable in LeanVMB with Blake
Thomas to ask Emil async about switching DevNet branch to smaller XMSS signatures to assess performance impact

devnet_optimizations.highlight: Optimization adoption status: Ream and Ethlambda implemented early block build + removed Type 1 compaction proofs; 8-second slot proposal not implemented by any team
Boma raised unresolved safety concern: Zeam's split-target-vote proposal changes 3-finality-slot source/target semantics; no safety argument documented yet

networking.highlight: ETH P2P (ESP2P) explored as gossip replacement for PQ-sized objects; Zeam (Zig) and Ethlambda (Rust) have independent implementations interoping, but no benchmark vs libp2p yet
Teams directed to reach out to Camille (EF P2P team) for guidance on PQ P2P stack evolution

organizational.highlight: After August break, meeting format may shift to bi-weekly presentations (e.g., binary field techniques) with async debugging; no change today

action_items.action: Thomas to post async question to Telegram for Emil: evaluate switching DevNet to smaller XMSS branch of LeanVM
Post Zeam split-target-vote HackMD link to Telegram; teams to assess safety implications before implementing
Teams exploring ETH P2P replacement to contact Camille (EF) for P2P stack guidance

decisions.decision: No team has adopted the 8-second slot proposal; all implemented optimizations are the overlapping subset from the Ethlambda proposal only
